name: Tanabe Consulting Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tanabe Consulting Co., Ltd. engages in the management and marketing consulting activities. It offers sales and web promotion, merger and acquisition, human resource development, function, digital transformation, and domain consulting, as well as strategy research and business management services. The company serves the healthcare, construction, infrastructure, business model, house and living, lifestyle, agribusiness, manufacturing, SDG, tourism, education and learning, logistics, and food production sectors. It operates an office network covering 10 cities in Japan. The company was formerly known as Tanabe Management Consulting Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
